blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 70".
